name: jackpot
description: Players buy tickets with in-game currency and a daily draw picks a winner — more tickets = better odds. Prize pool grows with each ticket purchase.

profitMargin.description: Fraction of the pot the server keeps (0 = no server fee, 0.99 = server keeps 99%)

maxTicketsPerPlayer.description: Maximum tickets a single player can hold for one draw

minimumParticipants.description: Minimum number of unique players required to proceed with the draw

announceTicketPurchases.description: Whether to broadcast ticket purchases to all players

rolloverOnCancel.description: When true, pot rolls over to the next draw instead of refunding players on cancellation

permissions.description: Allows a player to buy jackpot tickets
Allows a player to view their current jackpot ticket count

buy-ticket.helpText: Buy one or more jackpot tickets for the current draw. Usage: buyticket <amount>

jackpot-info.helpText: Shows the current pot, participant count, total tickets, and ticket price for the upcoming draw.

next-draw.description: See when the next jackpot draw is
next-draw.helpText: Shows how long until the next jackpot draw at midnight UTC.

view-tickets.description: View your current jackpot ticket count
view-tickets.helpText: Shows how many tickets you currently hold for the upcoming draw.

draw-jackpot.description: Daily jackpot draw at midnight UTC — picks a winner weighted by ticket count
